Prompt:
Motion Capture Data: A humanoid female character performing a seated sequence.
Phase 1 (0-3s): Sitting on a chair, torso leaned forward at a 45-degree angle, both hands resting flat on the knees. Head tilted down, chin tucked, eyes fixed on the floor.
Phase 2 (Transition): A gradual neck and spinal rotation. The head lifts and turns toward the upper right quadrant.
Phase 3 (End): Ending with a steady gaze directed at a camera located at an elevated 45-degree angle to the right. Smooth joint transitions, no foot sliding.
